name: ARTERIOVENOUS MALFORMATION OF UTERUS
definition: UTERINE ARTERIOVENOUS FISTULA = UTERINE CIRSOID ANEURYSM

demographics.Associated with: dilatation & curettage, endometrial carcinoma, gestational trophoblastic

dominant_finding: vascular lake with sluggish flow hyperintense on T2WI
discriminating_features: tortuous tubular signal voids in myometrium / parametrium / protruding into endometrial
vascular lake with sluggish flow hyperintense on T2WI
intensely enhancing lesion isointense to vessels on contrast-enhanced dynamic subtraction

MR: tortuous tubular signal voids in myometrium / parametrium / protruding into endometrial
vascular lake with sluggish flow hyperintense on T2WI
intensely enhancing lesion isointense to vessels on contrast-enhanced dynamic subtraction
